---
title: "VPN Access"
---

Some modes of access to the HPC system require users to be connected to a VPN using the Cisco Secure Client.


## Requesting VPN access
Before using the VPN, users must request to be added to the VPN group and enroll in DUO.

1) To request to be added to the VPN group, submit a [Request Ticket](https://health.uconn.edu/high-performance-computing/contact/)
2) You will receive an email regarding DUO enrollment from "DUO Security". Follow the instructions to enroll in DUO.

## Installation
Once granted access, install the Cisco Secure Client. The client can be downloaded from the links below. 

<!-- 
TODO: Supposedly everyone should be able to access this link. Doesn't work when I use my UConn Credentials
The Cisco Secure Client can be downloaded at [here](https://uchc.sharepoint.com/sites/myUCONNHealth/updates/Lists/Posts/Post.aspx?ID=466&CT=1771426801029&OR=OWA-NT-Mail&CID=4f4de9bc-66a0-e44e-d76f-eb7cf9875b1f).

When prompted, enter your UConn Net ID and password to access the download instructions and download links. -->

### UConn Users
UConn users can download the Cisco Secure Client following the [UConn IT instructions](https://kb.uconn.edu/space/IKB/10907091023/Cisco+AnyConnect+VPN). 

Enter your UConn Net ID and password when prompted to access the instructions and download links.

### UConn Health Users
UConn Health users can download the Cisco Secure Client following the [UCHC IT instructions](https://uchc.sharepoint.com/sites/myUCONNHealth/updates/Lists/Posts/Post.aspx?ID=466&CT=1771426801029&OR=OWA-NT-Mail&CID=4f4de9bc-66a0-e44e-d76f-eb7cf9875b1f).

Enter your UConn Health Net ID and password when prompted to access the instructions and download links.


## Connecting
1) Open the Cisco Secure Client application on your computer.
2) In the address field, enter `connect.uchc.edu/cam`. Click on the “Connect” button.
3) When prompted, enter your CAM username and password to login.

![](img/vpn-cam.png){width="400px"}


## Help
If you have any issues with the CAM VPN apart from requesting access and DUO enrollment, please contact UConn Health IT Service Desk by email at [uconnprod@service-now.com](mailto:uconnprod@service-now.com) or by phone at [860-679-4400](tel:860-679-4400).

We do not have administrative access to the VPN to be able to assist with VPN issues.
